## Description
Provide a clear description of the feature, fix, or update you are introducing.

## Key Changes
- List specific code modifications, migrations, or dependencies added.

## Screenshots / Video Demo (if UI changes)
Add any visual proofs or recordings.

## Testing & Verification
- [ ] Backend test results verified.
- [ ] Frontend styling and responsiveness verified.
- [ ] Integration with FPT AI Factory LLM tested.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines.
- [ ] Environment variables updated in `.env.example` if applicable.
- [ ] No API keys committed in source code.
